description_long: This is a single-story bungalow surrounded by a dense perimeter of trees and shrubbery, enclosed within a low boundary wall. The structure features a prominent, dark brown hip roof with multiple intersecting sections, and light-colored exterior walls with large windows. The front of the bungalow includes a covered porch area, while the rear opens to a spacious, landscaped backyard with additional greenery. The property includes a driveway that curves along one side, leading to a parking area adjacent to the house. The overall layout is symmetrical, with the house centrally positioned and the landscaping providing privacy and aesthetic appeal. The architectural style is traditional, with classic bungalow proportions and a welcoming, residential character.
description: A single-story bungalow with a dark hip roof, light walls, and large windows, surrounded by dense trees and a low wall. Features a covered porch, landscaped yard, and a curved driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, and symmetrical landscaping with dense trees along the boundary.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved driveway, parking area, and the side elevation of the bungalow with visible windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, additional greenery, and the back facade of the bungalow with large windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the rear porch area, more landscaping, and the hip roof structure from a different angle.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side and rear windows
